name: 工作沟通句
description: 适合工作沟通、任务讨论和办公场景的句式练习。

items.english: Did you call me up last night?
items.chinese: 您晚上给我打电话了吗？

items.english: Are you for or against the plan?
items.chinese: 你赞成还是反对这个计划？

items.english: Let me call you back later, OK?
items.chinese: 等一下再打电话给你，可以吗？

items.english: What time will you leave the office?
Would you take part in the project?
items.chinese: 你愿意加入这个项目吗？

items.english: Why didn't you call me last night?
items.chinese: 怎么你昨晚没有给我打电话？

items.english: I have to go back to work.
Why are you arguing with the manager?
items.chinese: 你为什么要和经理争论？

items.english: I plan to stay in the city.
I am the boss in my office.
items.chinese: 我是我们办公室的头儿。

items.english: Do you often travel abroad on business?
Today I came to work by car.
You have to go to the meeting.
I am the leader of this team.
I wish I didn't have to work.
I was just about to call you.
Who is the boss of this company?
I call on him every other day.
I am glad to have her company.
I don't want to quit this job.
She is what we call a bookworm.
I plan on buying a new umbrella.
I think your work is all right.
I don't plan to stay very long.
Why didn't you call me yesterday evening?
items.chinese: 怎么你昨晚没有给我打电话？

items.english: I must hand in the report today.
Does the heating work in the winter?
I want to work with your company.
I'll call you when I arrive home!
I hope that it'll work next time.
I am quite ignorant of the plan.
items.chinese: 我对这个计划一无所知。

items.english: I'd like to work at the cafeteria.
I just wanted to check my email.
items.chinese: 我只想查一下我的电子邮件。

items.english: You can trust him with any job.
items.chinese: 任何工作你都可以放心的交给他。

items.english: He is not one for hard work.
He began to look for a job.
I am quite ignorant of their plan.
items.chinese: 他们的计划我一无所知。

items.english: I'm afraid you have to work overtime.
I intend to see the project through.
We elected her captain of our team.
items.chinese: 我们选她为我们队的队长。

items.english: You must go through with your plan.
items.chinese: 你必须按照你的计划行事。

items.english: My job is to wash the dishes.
He's begun to look for a job.
She has plenty of work to do.
She made a mess of the work.
I asked the company for his resume.
items.chinese: 我向他公司询问了他的经历。

items.english: You can call me anytime you like.
items.chinese: 你喜欢什么时候打给我就什么时候打。

items.english: I'm getting too old for this job.
items.chinese: 对于这份工作来说，我的年龄太老了。

items.english: He likes to work in the garden.
You must carry out your first plan.
items.chinese: 你们应该实行你们最初的计划。

items.english: He is still green at the job.
I had no trouble finding his office.
items.chinese: 我毫不费劲就找到他的公司。

items.english: Her garden is a work of art.
items.chinese: 她的花园是一件艺术作品。

items.english: I guess my job is pretty undramatic.
items.chinese: 我觉得我的工作太平淡无奇了。

items.english: He had no luck in finding work.
He left his office in a hurry.
Hope we can do business again someday.
items.chinese: 希望我们有机会再合作。

items.english: I've just returned from the post office.
You'd better not keep company with him.
His son doesn't work at a bank.
I inspired my students to work harder.
items.chinese: 我鼓励学生们更努力地学习。

items.english: He will call for me about six.
items.chinese: 他六点左右要给我打电话。

items.english: I can't work for this company anymore.
items.chinese: 我没法再在这家公司里面工作了。

items.english: Being a teacher is very hard work.
The rat's here! Go call the cat!
She decided to chuck her job in.
items.chinese: 她決定要丟下她的工作。

items.english: The meeting is held twice a month.
She wants to work at the hospital.
The door of the office is yellow.
Their job is to fry the potatoes.
Almost all the work is done now.
items.chinese: 幾乎所有的工作都完成了。

items.english: Tell him to mind his own business.
Let's get to work on that problem.
Please call a taxi for this lady.
items.chinese: 请为这位女士叫辆出租车。

items.english: Can they finish this before the deadline?
items.chinese: 他们能不能在最后期限之前完成这项工作?

items.english: Bringing up a baby is hard work.
items.chinese: 养大一个宝宝是一项艰难的工作。

items.english: She decided to resign from her job.
The problem is that it wouldn't work!
The man is making a telephone call.
items.chinese: 男人正在用座机打电话。

items.english: He left the office in great haste.
items.chinese: 他急急忙忙地离开了办公室。

items.english: The plan gave rise to much trouble.
items.chinese: 这个计划带来了很多麻烦。

items.english: The athletic meeting will be put off.
He doesn't have a job. He's retired.
They talked over the plan for hours.
items.chinese: 他们谈计划谈了几个小时。

items.english: Our company has many projects to do.
items.chinese: 我们公司有很多项目要做。

items.english: When did you go to work?
The darkness will work to my advantage.
Do you plan to go abroad?
What are the company's strengths and weaknesses?
items.chinese: 公司的长处和短处是什么？

items.english: What do you do for work?
